Class ImageLoader

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ImageLoader
public class ImageLoader extends Object
Utility class responsible for loading and caching game images. It provides a fallback placeholder if an image is missing to prevent the game from crashing.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Image
    getImage(String name)
    Retrieves an image by its name from the cache or loads it from resources.

  • Method Details

    • getImage

      public Image getImage(String name)
      Retrieves an image by its name from the cache or loads it from resources.
      Parameters:
      name - the filename of the image (without extension).
      Returns:
      the loaded Image, or a pink placeholder if the file is not found.
